value.0: Lagnar Bronzebeard serves as the Coinmaster of Barak Runedar, a seasoned dwarf entrusted with the oversight of the hold's counting house and de facto treasury. Broad-shouldered and deliberate in manner, he keeps the ledgers, vaults, and trade accounts in strict order.

The Watcher keeps an eye on those who enter the facility, ensuring that all who come do so with intent to use the offered services as intended. One cannot elude the Watcher. It indicates the presence of all, to ensure the safety of patrons and their goods.

Value.value: *The construct's eyes gleam as it examines you.*

value.0: The Hearthguard are the elite force of Barak Runedar, specialized in the art of combat and defense alike. Many serve as bodyguards and escorts for high-profile citizens (such as the royal family), but most are just as eager to jump into fierce battle with all enemies of the dwarves.
This is a settlement guard insignia for the guard templates.

Value.value: I be thinkin' there be lots o' snow this year.
I be proud ta serve my people.

value.0: The Runecasters of Barak Runedar are a small but specialized number of dwarves who are skilled with using magic through the dwarven art of runecasting. They may not be wizards in the classic sense, with dusty tomes and bent quills, but they are nonetheless deadly in their power.
This is a settlement guard insignia for the guard templates.
